assertionResults.title: preserves the incoming page list query in viewer, edit, and back routes

assertionResults.fullName: PageList.vue renders one grouped reorder block per page for user_page
assertionResults.title: renders one grouped reorder block per page for user_page

assertionResults.fullName: PageList.vue does not render the reorder block for user_scan only
assertionResults.title: does not render the reorder block for user_scan only

assertionResults.title: updates affected pages when moving a page to a target position

assertionResults.title: shows an error and does not update pages for an invalid target position
